title: Parsing argument problem
body:
I've updated code to
`21dbdbf69 (HEAD -> master, origin/master, origin/HEAD) Tests: Auto-skip when not in root repo`
After building issuing --version causes:

```
(env) frak@laptop ~/repos_local/github.com/verilator/verilator (master) $ verilator --version
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-201-g21dbdbf69
%Error: Verilator internal fault, sorry. Suggest trying --debug --gdbbt
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /home/frak/repos_local/github.com/verilator/verilator/bin/verilator_bin --version
```
code_blocks:
(env) frak@laptop ~/repos_local/github.com/verilator/verilator (master) $ verilator --version
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-201-g21dbdbf69
%Error: Verilator internal fault, sorry. Suggest trying --debug --gdbbt
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /home/frak/repos_local/github.com/verilator/verilator/bin/verilator_bin --version
